topWPAPlays.description: Michael Harris II doubles (9) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Ryan O'Hearn. Dominic Smith scores. Mike Yastrzemski scores. Jorge Mateo scores.
Jared Triolo pops out to second baseman Ozzie Albies.
Endy Rodríguez strikes out swinging.
Brandon Lowe doubles (15) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr.
Ryan O'Hearn grounds out to first baseman Matt Olson.
Rafael Marchán homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field. Justin Crawford scores.
Alec Bohm doubles (9) on a line drive to right fielder Rikuu Nishida. Bryce Harper scores. Brandon Marsh to 3rd.
Randal Grichuk singles on a line drive to center fielder Justin Crawford. Andrew Benintendi scores. Colson Montgomery scores.
Tristan Peters doubles (15) on a fly ball to left fielder Brandon Marsh. Chase Meidroth scores. Tristan Peters to 3rd.
Brandon Marsh homers (8) on a fly ball to left center field.
Cody Bellinger homers (9) on a fly ball to right center field.
Willson Contreras doubles (9) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Cody Bellinger. Ceddanne Rafaela scores.

Isiah Kiner-Falefa grounds into a double play, second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Andruw Monasterio out at 2nd. Isiah Kiner-Falefa out at 1st.
Paul Goldschmidt singles on a line drive to right fielder Wilyer Abreu. José Caballero scores.
Anthony Volpe lines out to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
Andrés Giménez doubles (8) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Tyler O'Neill. Kazuma Okamoto scores.
Taylor Ward grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Blaze Alexander out at 2nd. Taylor Ward out at 1st.
Nathan Lukes singles on a ground ball to second baseman Jackson Holliday, deflected by pitcher Yennier Cano. Andrés Giménez scores.
Colton Cowser homers (6) on a fly ball to right center field.
Taylor Ward homers (3) on a fly ball to left field. Blaze Alexander scores.
Kevin McGonigle singles on a line drive to right fielder Victor Robles, deflected by second baseman Cole Young. Zach McKinstry scores. Wenceel Pérez scores.
Wenceel Pérez triples (1) on a line drive to right fielder Luke Raley. Spencer Torkelson scores. Zach McKinstry scores.
Josh Naylor doubles (7) on a ground ball to right fielder Kerry Carpenter, deflected by first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Julio Rodríguez scores.
Kevin McGonigle flies out to left fielder Randy Arozarena.
Kevin McGonigle homers (4) on a fly ball to right field.
Otto Lopez triples (3) on a line drive to right fielder Victor Mesa Jr. Liam Hicks scores.

Marlins challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Victor Mesa Jr. strikes out swinging and Cedric Mullins caught stealing 2nd, catcher Joe Mack to shortstop Otto Lopez to catcher Joe Mack.
Yandy Díaz singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Taylor Walls scores.
Joe Mack reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Taylor Walls. Esteury Ruiz scores. Jakob Marsee scores. Fielding error by catcher Hunter Feduccia.
Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, third baseman Javier Sanoja to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Kyle Stowers. Richie Palacios out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.
Nick Kurtz homers (12) on a line drive to right center field. Alika Williams scores.
Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, third baseman Zack Gelof to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Christian Walker out at 2nd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.
Brent Rooker doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Brice Matthews. Shea Langeliers scores.
Jeremy Peña grounds into a double play, third baseman Zack Gelof to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Taylor Trammell out at 2nd. Jeremy Peña out at 1st.
Nick Kurtz reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Jeremy Peña. Zack Gelof scores.
Starling Marte homers (1) on a fly ball to center field. Lane Thomas scores. Maikel Garcia scores.
Brooks Lee flies out to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Maikel Garcia singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Austin Martin, deflected by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Carter Jensen scores. Lane Thomas to 3rd.
Nick Loftin doubles (8) on a line drive to right fielder Austin Martin. Vinnie Pasquantino scores.
Trevor Larnach doubles (10) on a fly ball to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Bryan Torres homers (2) on a fly ball to right field. Jordan Walker scores.
Matt McLain homers (8) on a fly ball to center field.
Victor Scott II reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by pitcher Sam Moll. José Fermín scores. Nelson Velázquez to 3rd. Victor Scott II to 2nd. Throwing error by pitcher Sam Moll.
Jordan Walker doubles (14) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Blake Dunn. Alec Burleson scores.
Matt McLain homers (7) on a fly ball to center field.
Justin Foscue homers (3) on a fly ball to left field. Josh Jung scores.
Ezequiel Duran doubles (14) on a line drive to left fielder Angel Martínez. Brandon Nimmo scores. Justin Foscue scores.
Josh Jung homers (8) on a fly ball to right field.
José Ramírez grounds out, second baseman Justin Foscue to first baseman Jake Burger.
Steven Kwan singles on a line drive to right fielder Brandon Nimmo.
Andrew Vaughn triples (1) on a line drive to right fielder Troy Johnston. William Contreras scores.
Gary Sánchez homers (6) on a fly ball to left center field. Andrew Vaughn scores.
Ezequiel Tovar doubles (13) on a line drive to right fielder Blake Perkins. Willi Castro scores.
Luis Rengifo doubles (9) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jake McCarthy. Andrew Vaughn scores.
Brice Turang singles on a ground ball to right fielder Troy Johnston. Luis Rengifo scores. Blake Perkins scores. Joey Ortiz to 3rd.
Gabriel Moreno homers (4) on a line drive to left field. Tommy Troy scores.
CJ Abrams homers (14) on a fly ball to right field.
Corbin Carroll homers (10) on a fly ball to center field.
Pavin Smith singles on a fly ball to left fielder Daylen Lile. Nolan Arenado to 3rd.
LuJames Groover grounds into a double play, shortstop CJ Abrams to second baseman José Tena to first baseman Luis García Jr. Geraldo Perdomo out at 2nd. LuJames Groover out at 1st.
Jo Adell homers (10) on a fly ball to left center field. Nolan Schanuel scores.
Sebastián Rivero singles on a line drive to center fielder Alex Call. Jo Adell scores. Nick Madrigal scores. Jose Siri to 3rd.
Ryan Ward homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field.
Umpire reviewed (home run), call on the field was upheld: Dalton Rushing homers (8) on a fly ball to right center field. Kyle Tucker scores. Alex Call scores.
Ryan Ward grounds into a double play, second baseman Oswald Peraza to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Alex Call to 3rd. Dalton Rushing out at 2nd. Ryan Ward out at 1st.
Freddy Fermin homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field. Samad Taylor scores.
Ty France grounds into a double play, second baseman Marcus Semien to shortstop Bo Bichette to first baseman Jared Young. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 3rd. Jackson Merrill out at 2nd. Ty France out at 1st.
Bo Bichette doubles (8) on a line drive to left fielder Samad Taylor. Carson Benge to 3rd.
Marcus Semien homers (8) on a fly ball to left field.
MJ Melendez homers (4) on a fly ball to right center field.
Alex Bregman lines into a double play, first baseman Rafael Devers to third baseman Matt Chapman. Kevin Alcántara out at 3rd.
Michael Busch pops out to shortstop Willy Adames.
Matt Chapman singles on a ground ball to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Jonah Cox scores.
Michael Busch singles on a ground ball to pitcher Erik Miller. Kevin Alcántara to 3rd. Kevin Alcántara advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by pitcher Erik Miller.
Alex Bregman pops out to shortstop Willy Adames.
